name: Tia Fuller
abstract: Tia Fuller (born March 27, 1976) is an American saxophonist, composer, and educator, and a member of the all-female band touring with Beyoncé. Fuller is currently a faculty member in the ensembles department at Berklee College of Music.

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Heath
about_quotes.evidence: I have a student now, she’s a great saxophonist... Tia Fuller, her name is. I met her when I went to Spellman College
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Heath — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Lisa Parrott
about_quotes.evidence: There’s another group I play with too... the front line Ingrid Jensen, Virginia Mayhew, Tia Fuller and Melissa on trombone.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lisa Parrott interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 22, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Wayne Bergeron
about_quotes.evidence: I mean they showed Tia Fuller, who played the saxophone stuff on there... But we played on the whole score
about_quotes.doc_title: Wayne Bergeron interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 29, 2020
